zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton於1210年出生在英國藍卡爾文維其可時，她的父親Hugh de Winwick25歲，母親Wife of Hugh de Winwick44歲。她和William de Lauton至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1246年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾洛福頓享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton于1210年出生在英国藍卡爾文維其可时，她的父亲Hugh de Winwick25岁，母亲Wife of Hugh de Winwick44岁。她和William de Lauton至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1246年在英国英格兰藍卡爾洛福頓享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Winwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Winnick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Winwick in Huntingdonshire, Lancashire, and Northamptonshire. The Huntingdonshire and Northamptonshire placenames derive from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farmstead’. The Lancashire placename derives from an Old English personal name Wineca + Old English wīc.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of Winnik, an occupational name for a wine seller, from Polish wino ‘wine’ + the agent suffix -nik.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton was born in 1210, in Winwick, Lancashire, England, her father, Hugh de Winwick, was 25 and her mother, Wife of Hugh de Winwick, was 44. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with William de Lauton. She died in 1246, in Lowton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton est née en 1210, à Winwick, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Winwick, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Wife of Hugh de Winwick, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec William de Lauton. Elle est décédée en 1246, à Lowton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton 1210 in Winwick, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Winwick 25 und ihre Mutter Wife of Hugh de Winwick 44. Sie hatte mit William de Lauton mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1246 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lowton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton è nata il nel 1210 nel Winwick, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Winwick, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Wife of Hugh de Winwick, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con William de Lauton. Morì nel 1246, nel Lowton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowtonが1210年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィンウィックで生まれた時，父Hugh de Winwickは25歳，母Wife of Hugh de Winwickは44歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Lautonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1246年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアロウトンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton(이)가 1210년 영국 랭카실르 윈윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Winwick(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wife of Hugh de Winwick(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 William de Lauton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 로턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton родилась в 1210 г. в местности винвикк, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Winwick было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Wife of Hugh de Winwick, 44. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от William de Lauton. Она умерла в 1246 г. в местности лоутон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton nació en 1210, en Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Winwick, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Wife of Hugh de Winwick, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con William de Lauton. Murió en 1246, en Lowton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
